name: instagram-profile
title: Instagram Profile
description: Instagram profile page for AF iPhone-chassis embeds. Verified-blue badge (#0095F6), follow/message buttons, 3-stat row (Posts/Followers/Following), bio + category + website, story highlights row with gradient covers, tab bar (Posts/Reels/Tagged), 3-column post grid with Reel/Carousel indicators. Two modes: own-profile (Profil bearbeiten + Profil teilen) and viewing-other-profile (Folgen + Nachricht). Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for AF brand-presence demonstrations on Experience-Page surfaces.
